name: Change package name
description: Appends ".morphe" to the package name by default. Changing the package name of the app can lead to unexpected issues.

options.title: Package name
options.description: The name of the package to rename the app to.

options.title: Update permissions
options.description: Update compatibility receiver permissions. Enabling this can fix installation errors, but this can also break features in certain apps.

options.title: Update providers
options.description: Update provider names declared by the app. Enabling this can fix installation errors, but this can also break features in certain apps.

name: Clone app
description: Renames the app and manifest package so it can be installed alongside another copy. By default this appends " B" to the launcher name and appends "B" to the package's main segment.

options.title: App name
options.description: The app name to use. Leave as Default to keep the original name and append the configured suffix.

options.title: App name suffix
options.description: Suffix appended to the original app name when App name is left on Default.

options.title: Package name
options.description: Full package name to use. Leave as Default to generate one from the original package name.

options.title: Package suffix
options.description: Suffix appended to the app's main package segment when Package name is left on Default.

options.title: Package prefix
options.description: Optional prefix to prepend to the generated package name. Ignored when a full Package name is set.

name: Disable Pairip license check
description: Disables Play Integrity API (pairip) client-side license check. This patch does not bypass Play Integrity attestation or pairipcore virtualization.

name: Enable debug
description: Enables debugging on the app by setting android:debuggable="true".

name: Enable Online Pro
description: Experimental companion patch that keeps byAir's online Pro gates open without forcing the crash-prone global entitlement refresh path.

name: Enable Pro
description: Enables Appsales features locked behind the subscription paywall and disables UI prompts for Appsales Premium.

name: Enable Pro
description: Suppresses the main byAir paywall, unlock banners, and local user gating without forcing the shared entitlement path globally.

name: Enable Pro
description: Forces Going (Going) subscription checks to always pass and disables the app-specific PairIP license redirect.

name: Enable Pro
description: Forces HypnoBox subscription entitlement checks to always pass.

name: Enable Pro
description: Forces Inoreader to always pass pro checks and disables free.

name: Hide app icon
description: Hides the app icon from the Android launcher.
